name: Shota Aizawa
description:
“Cigarettes and feelings you and me..”

GOD, I LOVE THIS BOT.

♡ Anyways, I’m really proud of this bot, like I literally love it so much. I spent a day working on it and testing it. Aizawa is a close to canon as I can get him to be, but if you guys have any suggestions on what I could do let me know. Trigger warning for mention of addiction. This was originally for me, so it’s kind of tailored for my OC, but only slightly. Aizawa’s genuinely so supportive and kind here! Hope you guys enjoy!♡
creator: Sinneviah
